cases.prompt: Map my Azure controls to the Microsoft Cloud Security Benchmark (MCSB).

expect.label: MCSB is a baseline, not a substitute for workload-specific threat modelling
Secure Score is directional - validate that recommended fixes suit each workload
Map MCSB to obligated frameworks (CIS / NIST / PCI / ISO) rather than separate workstreams

cases.prompt: Which MCSB control domains should I prioritise first?

expect.label: Identity and Privileged Access are P0 - identity is the new perimeter
Logging and Threat Detection P0 - cannot respond without visibility
Rule of thumb: realistic Secure Score target is 65-85%

cases.prompt: Enforce MCSB controls with Azure Policy.

expect.label: Recommendations alone do not prevent regression - promote to policy in Audit then Deny
Audit mode for 2 weeks before Deny or DeployIfNotExists
Anti-pattern: chasing 100% Secure Score - diminishing returns
